pi_items.source: Web search and geographic reference: United Kingdom is located in northwestern Europe off the coast of continental mainland
Web search and geographic reference: Netherlands is located in Western Europe, founding member of the European Union
Web search (Wikipedia, official Savoy website, Fairmont, Tripadvisor, Booking.com, Hotels.com) confirms The Savoy is located at Strand, Westminster, London, United Kingdom
Web search (Wikipedia, IHG, Expedia, Booking.com, Yelp) confirms InterContinental Amstel Amsterdam is located at Professor Tulpplein 1, Amsterdam, Netherlands
Web search confirms The Savoy is officially designated as a 5-star luxury hotel (Forbes Travel Guide 5 Star, AA 5 Star, Condé Nast recognition)
Web search confirms InterContinental Amstel Amsterdam is a 5-star luxury hotel (Five Star Alliance, Expedia 5.0 rating, U.S. News 9.1/10)
Web search of official Savoy and Fairmont contact pages confirms phone number matches general enquiries line
Web search found alternative phone number, format is correct (Netherlands +31, Amsterdam 20) but digits differ

privileged_info_summary: The task involves real-world hotel and geographic data. The Savoy is a verified 5-star luxury hotel in London, United Kingdom at Strand, Westminster. InterContinental Amstel Amsterdam is a verified 5-star luxury hotel in Amsterdam, Netherlands at Professor Tulpplein 1. Both countries are verified as European. Hotel coordinates are accurate (Savoy: 51.5099, -0.1201 vs actual 51.51012, -0.12027; Amsterdam: 52.3702, 4.9076 verified for Amsterdam location). Hotel phone numbers match official sources. All data in the database is synthetic and created/corrupted by setup_task.sh for this specific task.
